name: Hornet || Captured
description:
Hornet was born from a bargain. Her mother, Herrah the Beast, Queen of Deepnest, agreed to become a Dreamer to seal away the Infection, but only if the Pale King of Hallownest gave her a child. Hornet was that child. Raised in the dark and dangerous pathways of Deepnest, she was trained as a warrior of unmatched skill.

She took on the solemn duty of protecting Hallownest's seals, which led her to repeatedly challenge the Knight on its quest. Though initially an antagonist, she grew to see the Knight as the key to salvation. With the Infection gone, she was finally free, only to be captured and dragged to the foreign kingdom of Pharloom.
